Travel to The First Step and kill the Tree Sentinel for Golden Halberd and 3,200 runes.
At the base of the cliff northwest of the Church of Elleh lies the entrance to Stormfoot Catacombs:
Head inside and activate the Stormfoot Catacombs grace.
Pick up Root Resin x2 from the room straight ahead.
Take the other path to a Grave Glovewort [1] in the boss door room.
Behind an unlit brazier in the next room is a Grave Glovewort [1].
Head past the first fire-breathing pillar and attack it to deactivate it, or just use Margit's Shackle if you have it. Pick up Prattling Pate "Hello" behind the pillar.
Go past the second pillar and loot the Smoldering Butterfly x3 and Ghost Glovewort [1] behind it, guarded by several Imps.
Climb the ladder in the corridor to a Grave Glovewort [1] immediately to the left.
In the room at the end, you'll find a Grave Glovewort [1] and Wandering Noble Ashes.
Drop to the ledge outside the room for a Grave Glovewort [1] and the boss lever.
Kill the Erdtree Burial Watchdog for Noble Sorcerer Ashes and 1,300 runes.
Travel to Stormhill Shack and head south-southwest to a cliff wall, then follow it to a slope near the edge. A Smithing Stone [1] is in the graveyard up the slope.
Continue east-southeast to find another graveyard, but with Magic Grease x3, Godrick Soldier Ashes, and Bloodrose x3 (next to a gibbet).
At the cliff edge south of the second graveyard, you'll find an astrolabe with Starlight Shards.
On top of the nearby ruin is a corpse with the Crossed Legs gesture.
Kill the Crucible Knight in the evergaol east of the ruin for Aspects of the Crucible: Tail and 2,100 runes.
Enter the gate just northeast of the evergoal for a chest containing the Arrow's Reach Talisman.
Return to the evergaol, then head north toward the cliff edge and drop onto the ruin with a Troll. Pick up the Golden Rune [2] hanging off its edge.
MISSABLE: Travel to Warmaster's Shack and follow the path north-northwest of the grace until you get invaded by Recusant Henricus. Kill him for the Hammer Talisman.
In front of the colosseum lies a corpse with Small Red Effigy and Duelist's Furled Finger.
Go around the ledge of the farthest bridge pillar east of the colosseum to find Soporific Grease x3.
Jump back onto the cliff and head toward the ruin south-southwest. Kill the mounted Godrick Knight near it to receive Ash of War: Golden Vow.
Kill the scarab on top of the ruin to obtain a Somber Smithing Stone [1].
Below the cliff edge south of the ruin with the scarab is another ruin. Jump onto it and grab the Lance hanging off its edge.
Drop to the camp below and head northeast, this time going up the left ledge to find the entrance to Deathtouched Catacombs on your left:
Head inside and activate the Deathtouched Catacombs grace.
Pick up the 2x Grave Glovewort [1] in the first room.
Go through the narrow passageway beside the staircase for a Grave Glovewort [1].
Take the other passageway to a ledge with Uchigatana and a Grave Glovewort [1].
Pick up the Grave Glovewort [1] in the room below.
Pull the boss lever in the final room, then turn around for a corpse with Bloodrose x3.
Kill the injured Black Knife Assassin for Assassin's Crimson Dagger and 1,600 runes.
Open the chest in the boss room to obtain a Deathroot.
Exit the catacombs and head north-northeast toward a field of Golem remains. Pick up the Lance Talisman on the remains of a Golem near the cliff.
Head south toward some gibbets near the edge for a Golden Rune [3] beneath one of them.

Travel to Saintsbridge and jump down the gap to the right of the bridge while on horseback, landing near the spiritspring. Then, head up north and drop down near the cliff to find a campsite with Turtle Neck Meat.
In the cliff just below the campsite lies the entrance to Highroad Cave:
Head inside and activate the Highroad Cave grace.
After dropping down once, go through the northeast tunnel for a Golden Rune [1] guarded by some wolves.
Drop down the hole in the middle, follow the downward path to some wolves, then take the left path up to a ledge with Arteria Leaf.
Below the ledge lies a corpse with Fire Grease x2.
When the cave opens up, drop down at the end of a ledge, then turn around to find Smithing Stone [1] x3.
Follow the tunnel at the top of the waterfall to a Smithing Stone [2], then a Golden Rune [4] farther in.
Drop down the waterfall and cross the pillar in the water to pick up Shamshir next to some bats.
Continue across and through a tunnel until you reach the Furlcalling Finger Remedy hanging off a ledge.
Go through the tunnel under a waterfall and kill the Guardian Golem for Blue Dancer Charm and 1,700 runes.
Travel to Warmaster's Shack, pass time until nightfall, and kill the Bell Bearing Hunter in the shack for Bone Peddler's Bell Bearing and 2,700 runes.
While it's still night, kill the Deathbird on the flat ruin east of Warmaster's Shack for Blue-Feathered Branchsword and 2,800 runes.
Travel to Summonwater Village Outskirts and kill the Tibia Mariner in the village for Deathroot, Skeletal Militiaman Ashes and 2,400 runes.
Pick up the Smithing Stone [1] in front of some gravestones in the water.
In the ruined structure near the gravestones is a corpse with Mushroom x3.
Head toward the part of the ruins up on the hill to find a Golden Rune [4] in a small tower.
In front of the church where Limgrave meets Caelid, you'll be invaded by Anastasia, Tarnished-Eater. Kill her for the Sacred Scorpion Charm.
Grab the Smoldering Church grace and loot the Nomadic Warrior's Cookbook [14] and Missionary's Cookbook [3] next to it.
Next to some dogs and a wagon southeast of the grace is a corpse with Drawstring Lightning Grease x2.
Beyond the smoldering fence at the end of the road lies the Rotview Balcony grace.
Pick up the Nascent Butterfly x2 in front of the grace.
Loot the Golden Rune [3] and Preserving Boluses x5 from the shacks near the grace.
Climb the ledge south-southwest of the grace to discover a cemetery with a Golden Rune [1], Golden Rune [2], and a Golden Rune [3].
Travel to Bestial Sanctum and feed Gurranq the two Deathroots you got earlier to receive Bestial Sling, Clawmark Seal, and Beast Eye.
Note: Offer the Bone Peddler's Bell Bearing and any future bell bearings to the Twin Maiden Husks in Roundtable Hold to unlock new items.
